## All PR Comments Addressed
| Metric | Count | |--------|-------| | Total review threads | 19 | | Actionable (code changes) | 19 | | Discussion comments replied | 1 | | Batches | 1 | | Commits | 1 (`5ce85e8`) |
All 19 review threads resolved. The audit summary discussion comment has been replied to.
**Changes made:** Replaced verbatim code blocks with two-part source pointers (HTML comment + prose reference) across 6 documentation files: - `architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md` — 5 code blocks replaced - `cli/command-promotion.md` — 3 code blocks + line numbers replaced - `cli/rich-table-output.md` — 2 code blocks replaced - `planning/incremental-dispatch.md` — 1 line number reference replaced - `tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md` — 7 code blocks replaced (6 components section) - `textual/quirks.md` — 1 code block replaced
**Next steps:** 1. Push changes: `git push` or `gt ss` 2. Wait for CI to pass 3. Request re-review if needed
